text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
MBSF Cost and Use Segment Codebook │ March 2026 │ V 1.3 28 

EM_PRMRY_PMT 

LABEL: Evaluation and Management Primary Payer Amount 

DESCRIPTION: This variable indicates the total amount paid for evaluation and management (E/M) services by a 
primary payer other than Medicare for a given year. E/M claims are a subset of the claims in the Part B 
carrier and DME data files, and a subset of physician claims. 

The E/M claim lines are
